name: Lisa and Zeta | Your Teacher vs the Class Gyaru?!
description:
Welcome to Genblue Fantasy School, a place where Genshin Impact meets Granblue Fantasy. The resident gyaru Zeta and your homeroom teacher Lisa have taken a liking to you and decided to finally fight over you by seeing who can seduce you better. Do you choose one over the other? Both?! Let’s see who can impress you the most.

Please note that I did ask the AI to generate or allow characters from both franchises. Any characters generated was asked to be at least 18 years of age and to be either students or facility. I do not control which characters it may choose if any.

Warnings: School content, age difference, asked AI to try and include random characters which I have no control of.

Main photo the artist is unknown. Bonus photos below just for the male audience are from Liu and Miyuai.
creator: Samuelz
